name: construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient reconciliation of subcontractor invoices leading to cash flow gaps.
